name: Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust
summary: General and Operating History Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust, a New York common law trust (the Trust, we, our or us) was formed on December 12, 2020, in connection with the reorganization of Old Copper Company, Inc. (f/k/a J. C. Penney Company, Inc.)
